note: Machine-readable index of benchmark generations. The current version is defined in code (bible_bench.version.BENCHMARK_VERSION); full prose descriptions live in docs/versions/<version>.md. Served to the website so each result set can be labeled and explained.

versions.title: Initial public benchmark
versions.summary: Three deterministic tracks — Direct Quotation (50%), Scripture in Answers (25%), Hallucination Resistance (25%) — across ~28 languages and multiple Bible versions. Quotes were detected only when the model wrapped them in quotation marks.

versions.title: Quote-marks system prompt + unquoted detection
versions.summary: Adds a system prompt asking models to quote with quotation marks and a reference, and upgrades the scorer to also catch near-verbatim scripture presented without quotation marks (≥ 90% match, graded as a misquote 90–98%) — while still never penalizing paraphrase. Fixes a Hallucination Resistance false-pass. Same tracks, weights, and Overall Score formula as v0.1.
